title: DecisionOutput
description: Validated output contract of the Decision Layer. Every LLM response from the Decision layer must conform to this schema before being passed to the Action layer.

action.description: The single next action the agent will take

reasoning.description: One sentence explaining why this action was chosen

tool_name.description: MCP tool name to invoke (web_search or fetch_url), null when no tool is needed

tool_args.description: Key-value arguments passed to the MCP tool

answer.description: Final answer text, only populated when action is final_answer

examples.reasoning: No context yet — need web data to answer the query.
Found a highly relevant URL — crawl for detailed content.
User explicitly asked to remember this fact.
All required information gathered — composing final answer.
